input_dict.question: How many venues are involved in the main tournament which is part of the English Cricket Team's 2017-2018 schedule?
input_dict.source_summary: England will take part in a "three nation Twenty20 International (T20I) tournament" co‑hosted by Australia and New Zealand (English cricket team in Australia in 2017–18; 2017–18 Trans-Tasman Tri-Series). Neither of those passages lists or counts the tournament "Venues," so the number of venues cannot be determined from the provided sources.
input_dict.target_summary: Integrated evidence: The England tour includes a Test series that "will form part of the 2017–18 Ashes series." The 2017–18 Ashes series "will be played at five venues across Australia between 23 November 2017 and 8 January 2018." Retained facts for final answer: (1) the Test series on England's 2017–18 Australia tour is part of the 2017–18 Ashes, and (2) the 2017–18 Ashes series is scheduled at five venues across Australia.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Integrated evidence: The England tour includes a Test series that "will form part of the 2017–18 Ashes series." The 2017–18 Ashes series "will be played at five venues across Australia between 23 November 2017 and 8 January 2018." Retained facts for final answer: (1) the Test series on England's 2017–18 Australia tour is part of the 2017–18 Ashes, and (2) the 2017–18 Ashes series is scheduled at five venues across Australia.
